content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty is down 0.33%, Bank Nifty down 1.04%, PSU Banks weak (-1.83%), but Energy/Metals showing relative strength. Mixed market with sector rotation in play. VIX at 18 indicates moderate volatility. Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with most positions barely positive — focus must shift to risk management rather than fresh adds, especially given 5-day win rate of 14% and negative P&L.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +6.3% with CMP 1046 holding above VWAP 1049 and consolidating well above entry. Current SL 1035 already locks in profit; tightening slightly to 1025 (still ~2% buffer below CMP) maintains profit protection while giving room to run toward 1095 target. Strong Q4 results, GNPA <1%, sector tailwind. Don't trim — let winner run with protected SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -1.6%, CMP 123.14 above SMA20 (122.12) and SL at 119 still gives ~3.4% buffer. Gold thesis intact (geopolitical, Akshaya Tritiya demand). No action needed — SL appropriately wide for ETF volatility, target 135 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.6%, CMP 1437.90 hitting fresh 52w high on +1.45% day. Q4 results stellar (PAT +27%, revenue +23%). Tightening SL from 1420 to 1425 (above entry 1413) to lock breakeven+ as price action confirms momentum. Risk-reward improves with tighter SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.0%, CMP 409.85 near 52w high. Current SL 406 (above entry 404.50) already at breakeven+ — appropriately tight. Power sector strong, Q4 results May 15 catalyst. Letting it run toward 425 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +0.7%, CMP 1752 with strong intraday move on Organon acquisition news. Current SL 1742 already above entry 1734 — solid breakeven+ protection. Volume surge 5.3x confirms momentum. Hold for 1830 target; SL appropriate given pharma volatility and integration uncertainty."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -0.3%, CMP 319.70. SL at 315 gives ~1.5% buffer. Power sector tailwind intact, Q4 results May 19. Position hasn't moved decisively — let it develop, no MODIFY warranted yet (would be loosening or no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 461.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -0.5% but CMP 466.55 with intraday high of 473.90 on Q4 print (PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25). Tightening SL from 458 to 461 (still ~1.2% buffer below CMP) to reduce risk after stock rallied to near-52w high before fading slightly. Cost-pressure red flags warrant tighter risk control."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up modestly while preserving room for continued upside; locks in significant gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Wider SL appropriate for ETF; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL above entry to lock breakeven+ on a 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; no change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; ride Organon momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely negative; SL at 315 appropriate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 461.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL after early rally faded; protect against margin-pressure red flags."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATAPOWER pending BUY at 443 still OPEN — letting it work; will not stack. PHARMABEES and HINDZINC pending orders also unchanged. Strong setups noted on VBL (vol 4x, +30% MoM rally — but stretched), CUB (Q4 +25% PAT, bonus issue), POWERGRID-clustered names: holding back due to existing power exposure (NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER already constitutes a power cluster). Will watch CUB on a pullback to 270 with tight SL. NLCINDIA at all-time high too extended for fresh entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 positions with mixed performance. Win rate 14% over 5 days is concerning — capital preservation mode. Energy/power exposure already 3 names (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA) plus pending TATAPOWER = ~4 names in correlated cluster — NO MORE power/energy adds today regardless of breakout. Focus this tick is risk management on existing book: trailed SLs on 3 winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, COALINDIA). No new BUYs warranted — recent track record + market caution + cluster discipline all argue NO_ACTION on entries."
}
